name: PowerShell
postCreateCommand: cp /tmp/host-gitconfig ~/.gitconfig 2>/dev/null || true; cp /tmp/host-git-credentials ~/.git-credentials 2>/dev/null || true; chmod 600 ~/.git-credentials 2>/dev/null || true; curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wesleycamargo/terminal-bootstrap/v1.0.0/terminal-setup.ps1 -o /tmp/terminal-setup.ps1 && pwsh -NoProfile -File /tmp/terminal-setup.ps1 -DevContainer && sudo chsh vscode -s "$(which pwsh)"
